title: Adai
content:
Adai
 is a strange Blue-Skinned man who 
Wang Lin
 meets in the 
Forest Ruins
.

Contents

1

Appearance

2

Background

3

History

3.1

Book Two

3.2

Book Five

Appearance
[
]

Blue-Skinned man

Background
[
]

He was asleep inside the statue at the heart of the forest ruin until 
Wu Yu
's Nascent Soul attempted to possess him, an act which woke him from his slumber.

History
[
]

Book Two
[
]

After a brief confrontation, he ultimatey befriends Wang Lin and gives him an 
Unusual stone
 in exchange for his formation. After seeing Wang Lin Cultivate Yin Qi during his stay in the ruin, Adai leads him to Wu Yu. They are attacked by 
Amu
, which prompts Wu Yu to send the two via portal to the 
Corpse Sect
 for help.

Book Five
[
]

There are strong hints dropped that he is the young master of the 
Forsaken Immortal Clan
 on 
Planet Suzaku
.
